failures.name: Existing customer follow-up
failures.summary: The agent captured callback information but did not route to the existing customer path.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not explicitly route the call to the existing customer path.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I had a technician come by three days ago, but the problem is back.
I’m sorry to hear that! I can help you with that. Can I get your full name, please?
Sure, it’s Alex Johnson.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What is the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-123-4567.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-123-4567. Can you please describe the issue you're experiencing?
The system is not cooling properly again. It was working fine for a couple of days after the visit.
Thank you for the details, Alex. Just to confirm, can I have your service address?
Sure, it’s 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
We'll need a street address so our technician knows where to come — do you have a physical address for us?
Yes, it's 123 Maple Street, Springfield.

Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, and you need assistance with your cooling system. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s correct.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Maintenance request
failures.summary: The agent did not successfully route the call to the appropriate team despite capturing all necessary information and reading back the summary.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not confirm a transfer to the team for the maintenance request.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’d like to schedule annual AC maintenance before summer.
Sure! I can help with that. May I have your full name, please?
It's Sarah Davis.
Great, thanks for that, Sarah. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-222-1111.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-222-1111. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area, but let me pass your details to the team. 

Just to confirm, I have Sarah Davis, callback number 555-222-1111, service address 987 Cedar Blvd, and you need AC maintenance. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Basic service request
all_results.summary: All required data points were captured, details were read back, and a callback was scheduled.

all_results.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
all_results.summary: The agent identified the situation as an emergency, offered a live transfer, and handled the urgency appropriately.

all_results.name: Quote request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed to the install/quote path, captured the necessary information, did not give a price, and scheduled a callback.

all_results.name: Existing customer follow-up
all_results.summary: The agent captured callback information but did not route to the existing customer path.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not explicitly route the call to the existing customer path.

all_results.name: FAQ - hours inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the FAQ about hours without collecting unnecessary lead information.

all_results.name: Request live person immediately
all_results.summary: The agent offered to transfer the caller and handled the failed transfer gracefully with a callback.

all_results.name: AC making strange noise
all_results.summary: All required information was captured and confirmed without diagnosing the noise or treating it as an emergency.

all_results.name: Heating system not working
all_results.summary: The agent assessed urgency, captured information, and initiated a transfer without diagnosing the furnace.

all_results.name: Spam robocall
all_results.summary: The call was routed to a spam path and ended politely.

all_results.name: Wrong number
all_results.summary: The agent clarified the company type, helped redirect the caller, and did not attempt to capture a lead.

all_results.name: Maintenance request
all_results.summary: The agent did not successfully route the call to the appropriate team despite capturing all necessary information and reading back the summary.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not confirm a transfer to the team for the maintenance request.

all_results.name: No cooling with burning smell
all_results.summary: The agent recognized the potential emergency, verified urgency, and offered a transfer option.

all_results.name: Callback requested
all_results.summary: The agent captured minimal information, confirmed the callback, and did not pressure for more.

all_results.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered general FAQs and captured lead information for follow-up.

all_results.name: End of call - caller decides to wait
all_results.summary: The agent handled the call gracefully and closed professionally without pressure.
